pages.raw_text:
Has the Home Telephone com.
pany forfeited its franchise right
or its surety bond Of $4,000 by
failing to comply with the terms
of the agreement made with the
city council at the time the fran
chise was granted year ago.


AS the ordinance reads it looks
exactly as If this is what the COM
pany has done.


Section 13 of the telephone Or
dinance provides that the Home
company shall begin the work Of
constructing its telephone system
not more than eight months from
the date of acceptance and that
this work shall be continuously
prosecuted in good faith and shall
be completed in not more than
three years.


The Home franchise was sub
mitted to vote August II, 1905, and
accepted by the company August
&c Of the same year, practically
IL months ago.


Will somebody discover and
point out the construction work
that has been done in that time?


What little pretension there was
made Of doing anything was dis
continued entirely several days ago
when the Home company discharg.
ed the men on the local payroll and
all operations ceased for an In
definite period because Of trouble
with Washington and Oregon labor
unions with which the company
has failed to keep agreements.


In spite Of this general strike
and lockout the company has been
compelled to make an exception In
the case Of Walla Walla, where
its franchise will expire and be-
come void August 90 unless actual
construction work is begun before
that date. Consequently the Home
has made arrangements for the
purchase of few poles for the pur
pose of making a showing. This
plan, 1t is claimed, will not work,
however, as the franchise is hel0
to require diligent prosecution Of
the construction work.


Ho wabout Spokane's franchise
agreement with this same con-
Germ?


Among laboring men and to some
extent among the business inter
ests of this state the impression
is becoming prevalent that the
Home company has failed to real
ize all that was expected of it In
the financing and that fight with
organized labor has been invited
as the easiest way out Of tight
corner.
